calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR OSC
Off Calendar May-20-2022 Off Calendar

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, been assigned by Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant James M. McCall, a/k/a James McCall.
Dept: 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:50 a.m.

Amit Taneja, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Discover Bank.
Evin Culp, Vendor Analyst and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Taneja and Culp appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant James M. McCall, a/k/a James McCall.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts (Account Stated and Money Lent) was filed on October 5, 2020.
Defendant James M. McCall's, a/k/a James McCall, Answer to the Complaint was filed on May 10, 2021.
Notice of Time and place of Trial was served on November 4, 2021, setting trial for April 4, 2022.
Matter was assigned to Department 514 on April 11, 2022, and continued to today, May 9, 2022.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed on May 6, 2022.

Plaintiff Discover Bank submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Billing Statements for the period of 02/26/2019 through 02/25/2022.........ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of plaintiff Discover Bank, and against defendant James M. McCall, a/k/a James McCall, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $22,996.10.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $522.00.
Total - $23,518.10.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proceedings concluded at 11:04 a.m.

MASTER CALENDAR OSC
Off Calendar Apr-29-2022 Continued To May-20-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR OSC
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR OSC
Off Calendar Apr-15-2022 Continued To Apr-29-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-08-2022 Continued To May-09-22 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

Motion For Order Deeming Each Request For Admissions Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made in this matter.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK Motion For Order Deeming Each Request For Admissions Admitted is granted, and Plaintiff Discover Bank's Requests for Admissions to Defendant James M McCall are deemed admitted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2021 Set For Trial On Apr-04-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
